items.text: @unusual_whales: Sam Altman said at a recent event that costs had become a huge issue, adding that the company expects to find ways to help customers get more value for less spend. Read more: https://unusualwhales.com/news/openai-price-cuts-anthropic-token-war

@PauloMacro: Hear you, except the catch in this case is we have not seen an explosion in creates Instos would go to APs for creates to lend. Little creates which is why I think this short leans retail

@unusual_whales: Just minutes earlier, he had accused Iran of stalling peace talks and said that more strikes were coming. ‘We hit them hard yesterday, and we’re going to hit them again hard today,’ he said. Read more: https://unusualwhales.com/news/trump-birthday-wish-peace-iran-strikes
